name: Powdertown Golf
about: Powdertown Golf is a multi-service golf facility offering custom club fittings, repair services, and a simulator bay. Founded in 2006 by Dan Ludwig and now owned by Nate Ludwig, the business began as a Yamaha golf cart sales and service center before expanding into golf fittings and simulators. In 2013, they added Full Swing Golf simulators, enabling year-round play on state-of-the-art technology. The primary focus is on providing comprehensive golf services, including cart and club repairs, custom fittings using launch monitor data, and a full-service pro shop. The venue combines retail operations with a technology-driven practice space for golfers seeking to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional custom club fitting with 60-90 minute sessions using launch monitor data
State-of-the-art Full Swing Golf simulator technology for year-round play
Factory authorized Yamaha Golf Car sales and service center with expert staff
Comprehensive club repair services from certified technicians

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food or kitchen service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art technology installed in 2013 for year-round play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for the simulator sessions. For custom fitting appointments, they provide various club combinations to test.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is mentioned as being allowed. The venue does not have an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the duration for 18 holes, but fitting sessions are 60-90 minutes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is family-oriented and offers services suitable for juniors and youth golfers.
